title: Birth prep checklist: the last 4 weeks
excerpt: Birth plan basics, hospital bag ideas, fetal monitoring, warning signs, late-pregnancy nutrition, and light admin tasks.
content:
## Mindset and birth plan

Discuss preferences (support person, pain relief, skin-to-skin) with your birth team. Plans may change — flexibility helps.

## Hospital bag (suggestions)

- ID, insurance, prenatal records.
- Comfortable clothes, nursing bras, toiletries, phone charger.
- Baby clothes, blanket, diapers; car seat installed.

## Fetal monitoring

Know kick-count methods your clinician recommends. Report decreased movement promptly.

## When to go to the hospital

Regular painful contractions, water breaking, heavy bleeding, severe headache, vision changes, or reduced fetal movement — seek care per local protocol.

## Third-trimester nutrition

Continue iron, calcium, protein, and hydration; small frequent meals if heartburn.

## Light admin

Prepare newborn registration steps per local law; arrange help at home for the first weeks.
